sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41553" key="e)pi/frasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-φρᾰσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Rhet., <sense id="n41553.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">specific mention</tr_> of an individual, a form of pleonasm, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2596.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phoeb.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
